block.simplyspeakers.speaker: Speaker
gui.simplyspeakers.audio_dropoff.tooltip: How fast volume fades with distance. 0% = full volume until max range, 100% = gradual fade.
gui.simplyspeakers.loop.tooltip: When ON, the audio will restart automatically when it ends.
gui.simplyspeakers.max_range.tooltip: How far away the audio can be heard (in blocks).
gui.simplyspeakers.max_volume.tooltip: The overall volume level. Higher = louder at all distances.
gui.simplyspeakers.proxy_max_range.toolt: How far away the audio can be heard from this proxy (in blocks).
gui.simplyspeakers.proxy_max_volume.tool: The overall volume level. Higher = louder at all distances.
gui.simplyspeakers.proxy_speaker.title: Proxy Speaker
gui.simplyspeakers.proxy_speaker_id.tool: Set this to match a main Speaker's ID to play its audio at this location.
gui.simplyspeakers.search.tooltip: Search for music files by name
gui.simplyspeakers.speaker.title: Speaker
gui.simplyspeakers.speaker_id.tooltip: A unique name for this speaker. Proxy speakers with the same ID will play the same audio.
gui.simplyspeakers.upload.invalid_type: Invalid file type. Only MP3 and WAV files are supported.
item.simplyspeakers.speaker: Speaker
